_note: Merge into the existing placement_spec.json's `accessories` object. Anchor / sizeMeters / positionOffset values follow the same conventions as the original spec.

hair-short.notes: Hugs the dome of the head sphere. Anchor below center so the cap-shape sits over the crown.

hair-bun.notes: Compact bun + base — anchor places the bun slightly above the head apex. Brass pin reads as small accent.

hair-long.notes: Cascades below shoulders. PNG is taller than wide — DO NOT billboard, pin to the BACK of the head so it sits behind. Slight negative Z so it doesn't clip the head sphere.

hair-braid.notes: Center braid down the spine. Pin to back of head like hair-long. Brass tassel-tie at the bottom reads as a small accent.

hair-curls.notes: Wraps the head with a cloud of bumps. Wider than tall — the cluster extends past the head silhouette.

tunic.notes: Knee-length tunic with brass belt. Anchor at the neckline → positionOffset.y raises the plane so neckline lands at the shoulders.

coat.notes: Open formal coat with V-lapels and three brass buttons. Slightly wider than tunic to read as outer layer.

apron.notes: Bib-apron in parchment with brass tie at waist + bow. Z forward so it sits on top of any tunic underneath.

robe.notes: Full-length flowing robe with V-neck and brass clasp. Tallest of the clothing items.

vest.notes: Short open vest, ends at waist. Z forward so it sits on top of any base layer.

boots-work.notes: PAIRED — instantiate the same PNG twice, parented to lAnkle and rAnkle. Anchor at the top of the boot-shaft puts the ankle at the cuff.

shoes-dress.notes: PAIRED — lAnkle + rAnkle. Sleek oxford. Anchor near top of upper means the ankle joint sits just above the shoe.

sandals.notes: PAIRED — lAnkle + rAnkle. Skin-toned foot visible, brass straps over instep + ankle wrap.

barefoot.notes: PAIRED — lAnkle + rAnkle. Explicit 'none' marker. Use when persona is intentionally barefoot (child, contemplation, vulnerability).
